title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (reasoning), Scout (always-on agent), Majorana 2 (quantum), and others, positioning itself as both partner and competitor to OpenAI across the full AI stack. The commentary frames this as Microsoft's attempt to control more layers of AI infrastructure and become an independent AI threat rather than just a dependent partner.
